2606.24320.title: ZONOS2 Technical Report
2606.24320.paper_summary: We present ZONOS2 8B, our latest TTS model, which achieves state-of-the-art naturalness, prosody, and voice cloning fidelity. We improve upon Zonos-v0.1 across scale, data, and training recipe. We scale the model from 1.6B to 8B total parameters (900M active) with a novel mixture-of-experts (MoE) backbone, improving inference latency and throughput. We expand our training corpus from 200K to over 6M hours using a new data processing pipeline, and we simplify our post-training and conditioning recipes to improve naturalness and voice cloning fidelity. We evaluate ZONOS2 8B on quality, speaker similarity, WER, and ZTTS1-Eval, our novel TTS benchmark, where it performs competitively with state-of-the-art systems while maintaining good streaming latency. We release our model weights and example inference code under an Apache 2.0 license on GitHub and Hugging Face.
2606.24320.paper_summary_zh: 我們推出 ZONOS2 8B，這是我們最新的 TTS 模型，實現了最先進的自然度、韻律和聲音克隆保真度。<lb/>我們在規模、數據和訓練配方上改進了 Zonos-v0.1。<lb/>我們將模型的參數從 1.6B 擴展到 8B 總參數（900M 活躍），採用新型的專家混合（MoE）架構，改善了推理延遲和吞吐量。<lb/>我們將訓練語料庫從 200K 擴展到超過 6M 小時，使用新的數據處理管道，並簡化了後訓練和調整配方，以提高自然度和聲音克隆保真度。<lb/>我們在質量、說話者相似性、WER 和 ZTTS1-Eval（我們的新 TTS 基準）上評估 ZONOS2 8B，該模型在保持良好串流延遲的同時，與最先進的系統競爭表現。<lb/>我們在 GitHub 和 Hugging Face 上以 Apache 2.0 授權釋出我們的模型權重和示例推理代碼。
2606.24320.author: Gabriel Clark et.al.
2606.24320.authors: Gabriel Clark, Sofian Mejjoute, Mohamed Osman, George Close, Beren Millidge
